chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.586 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.3502/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.3503/2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 07.03.2025 Ms. Erum Riaz, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Muhammad Hamid son of Munshi Khan seeks protective bail in FIR No.310/2013, registered at P.S. Shah Faisal Colony, Karachi for offence under Sections 395, PPC. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant was unaware about registration of aforesaid FIR and he has not intentionally absconded and now he intends to surrender before the learned trial Court concerned, but he apprehends his arrest as the concerned police is bent upon to arrest him in order to humiliate and disgrace him, therefore, he needs some protection to enable him to appear before trial Court concerned. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicant/accused Muhammad Hamid son of Munshi Khan, for a period of four days from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the investigation/trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of four days from today or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of four days from today or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
